goal: Build a tabletop rearrangement task: 4 cubes start at known positions on the table (no conveyor), robot picks each and places in target positions to form a 2x2 grid on a pallet. Tests pure pick-place without belt motion.
thoughts:
Six tabletop-rearrangement specifics for CP-27 (extends CP-08 — drop_targets pattern but no conveyor):
1) 4 cubes pre-placed on table at scattered xy positions: (0.2, 0.3), (0.4, 0.3), (-0.2, 0.3), (-0.4, 0.3). z=0.775 (table top + cube/2).
2) Pallet 0.30×0.30×0.05m at [0, -0.4, 0.775] — same as CP-08.
3) drop_targets dict has 4 entries — same 2x2 grid as CP-08 ({-0.04, +0.04} × {-0.44, -0.36}).
4) NO conveyor. NO belt_path arg to setup_pick_place_controller — handler skips belt_pause/resume. Pure motion-plan pick-place.
5) Sensor at (0.4, 0.3, 0.835) — covers the +X half of the source area. Cubes at (-0.2, -0.4) start outside sensor. As they don't move (no belt), sensor only fires for closest cubes. Or: sensor not strictly needed — cuRobo handler picks any cube within reach if sensor isn't gating.
6) Without sensor gating + belt pause, controller has no temporal trigger. cuRobo handler's _next_cube selects closest within reach by default — works without sensor too.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Stationary work surface (acts as belt_path for handler — surface_velocity=0 so no motion)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/WorkSurface",
    position=[0.0, 0.3, 0.78],
    size=[1.5, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

# 4 cubes scattered on work surface top (z=0.835)
for i, (x, y) in enumerate([(0.2, 0.3), (0.4, 0.3), (-0.2, 0.3), (-0.4, 0.3)]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, y, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Target pallet — same as CP-08
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pallet", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.15, 0.15, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Sensor at +X side (covers Cube_1, Cube_2). Cube_3, Cube_4 picked when controller's reach selection finds them after Cube_1/2 done.
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.3, 0.3, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# belt_path = WorkSurface (stationary — surface_velocity=0). Handler-required arg.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/WorkSurface",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Pallet",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.04, -0.44, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [ 0.04, -0.44, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_3": [-0.04, -0.36, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_4": [ 0.04, -0.36, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/WorkSurface", "/World/Pallet"],
)
extension_notes: CP-27 demonstrates pure pick-place without conveyor. Cubes pre-placed on table; robot rearranges to pallet grid. Useful for assembly/disassembly canonicals where input is a static workspace. Without belt_path, handler skips belt-pause logic — no PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI needed.
failure_modes: Cube_3, Cube_4 outside sensor zone but within reach. cuRobo handler's _next_cube uses reach-based selection. Sensor mainly gates timing for belt scenes; not strictly needed here.
Cubes too close to robot base — base 'thigh' may collide. (0.2, 0.3) and (-0.2, 0.3) are 0.36m from base; safe.
Drop precision drift can accumulate — same as CP-08, ~5cm. Pallet 30cm gives margin.

verify_args: pick_path normally a conveyor or sensor; here using cube path directly. Verifier checks cube_path → place_path bridge. With Cube_1 path, bridge check may fail if expecting prims with physics surface velocity. Form-gate may show pipeline issue.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths — Cube_3, Cube_4 delivered to Pallet)
